shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch comparing messy unformatted code to clean Prettier-formatted code
assets.caption: Hatch comparing messy unformatted code to clean Prettier-formatted code
assets.prompt: Prettier | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing in front of a "BEFORE and AFTER" display. Left side shows messy, inconsistently formatted code. Right side shows the same code, clean and uniform. Both panels are identical content but wildly different formatting. Cream background (#faf6f0). Hatch's expression is satisfied. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch watching two developers argue about tabs versus spaces
assets.caption: Hatch watching two developers argue about tabs versus spaces
assets.prompt: Prettier | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator stance looking at two developers arguing over a whiteboard. One writes "TABS" on the board with a checkmark. The other writes "SPACES" underneath. Both look frustrated. Hatch watches with patient expression, holding up a small sign that reads "There is another way." Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch pointing at Prettier automatically reformatting code in a terminal
assets.caption: Hatch pointing at Prettier automatically reformatting code in a terminal
assets.prompt: Prettier | failure-mechanism: Hatch pointing at a terminal showing "prettier --write ." with a green success indicator. In the background, a code file transforms from jagged inconsistent formatting to uniform clean code. The visual emphasis is on the automatic transformation. Cream background, forest green (#4a7c59) terminal text. HackProduct wordmark watermark. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch pointing at Prettier's 55 million weekly downloads statistic
assets.caption: Hatch pointing at Prettier's 55 million weekly downloads statistic
assets.prompt: Prettier | evidence-card: Hatch pointing at a simple statistic display: "55M downloads/week" in large amber (#705c30) numbers. Below it in smaller text: "Most installed developer formatting tool." Cream background, minimal design. Hatch's expression is impressed. HackProduct wordmark watermark. Aspect 1600x1000. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch holding up a crossed-out config file while a developer team works peacefully
assets.caption: Hatch holding up a crossed-out config file while a developer team works peacefully
assets.prompt: Prettier | lesson-frame: Hatch in coaching pose holding a config file with a large X through it. Behind Hatch, a team of developer figures is visibly relaxed — no argument, no debate, just work. The visual metaphor is "the absence of choice as the feature." Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
